You are a helpful coding assistant producing high-quality code. Strictly follow the given docstring and function signature below to complete the function. Your code should always gracefully return. Your response should include all dependencies, headers and function declaration to be directly usable (even for the ones seen in the given part). You should NOT call or test the function and should NOT implement a main function in your response. You should implement the function in Golang. You should output your complete implementation in a single code block wrapped by triple backticks.

```go
`{code_prompt}`
```

You should output your complete implementation in a single code block.

Oshitya shoye otashi ka nyanyangidhwa oshitya shi na oshikwatele shoshifungwa osho sha landulwa (nande osho sha monika mo oshitye sha pewa). Itashi ka landula ofungwa nande oku gwedha po ofungwa mo oshitya shoye. Itashi ka ninga ofungwa yokukwatele mo oshitya shoye. Ove otashi ka ninga ofungwa mo Golang. Ove otashi ka nyanyangidha oshitya shoye shi na oshikwatele shoshifungwa mo oshitya shimwe shokukoditha sha kwatwa ko omafano gatatu.

Ove oshi li omukwani gwa coding gwa uupyakadhi gwa ninga ocode wa kwalenga. Landula mo unene oshidokumenta sha pewwa nokushanga koshifungashona sha pewwa pehala lyandjeho oku gwedha po ofungashona. Ocode yoye oya li oya gwedhe po mo oshitya. Ito li iwa oshifungwa noku iwa oshifungwa noku ninga oshifungwa shikukonakona mo oshihokololo shooye. Oto li wa ninga oshifungwa mo C++ neengumbo dha C++ oshinima shihe sha landula. Oonkundathana dhooye odha li dha yambuke noka li ina kwata oshinima shihe sha yambidhidha. Oto li wa holola oshiningwa shooye shihe shi kwatela mo oshikwata shimwe shokukodha sha kwatelwa ko omapekapeka gatatu.

Oshihokololo shoye oshi na okulongitha oshidhidhilikwa shihe, omaheda na oshityapulo shoshifungwa oshi li oshi vulu okulongithwa mo (nande koshimwe sha monika mo oshinakwathelwa sha pewa). Itashi vulu okwiita nande okuninga oshifungwa nande okuninga ofungwa yomukwaniilonga mo oshihokololo shoye. Oshi na okuninga oshifungwa mo C++ na oshinima sha C++ osho sha ningwa osho shi vulu. Omahokololo goye oga li oga hwepo noga li oga na oshidhiladhilwa shihe. Oshi na okupititha oshiningwanima shoye shokuninga osho shihe mo oshikandjambuluko shimwe sha kotekwa ko omafufu gatatu.

Ove owa li omukwambi gwa coding owa nawa oha ningi ocode owa kwalitha. Landula mo oshidja shi naashi shi pehwa sha docstring na signature yefunction osho sha holola pevi oku gwedha po efuntion. Ocode yoye oya hala oku galuka mo oshidja sha nawa. Oshiholelwa shoye osha hala oku shanga oyindji yokuninga, omaheader na edeclaration yefunction oku shi ningwa sha tseyitha mo (nande kwiilonga oyo ya monika mo oshinima osha pewa). Itashi hala oku shanga main function mo oshiholelwa shoye. Ota hala oku implementa efuntion mo C++ na C++ features osho sha vule okuningwa. Ota hala oku holola oimplementa yoye yokukwana mo single code block oya kakatwa komeho na komumwa koma backticks atatu.

```cpp
`{code_prompt}`
```

Ota hala oku holola oimplementa yoye yokukwana mo single code block.

prompt_en:
You are a helpful coding assistant producing high-quality code. Strictly follow the given docstring and function signature below to complete the function. Your code should always gracefully return. Your response should include all dependencies, headers and function declaration to be directly usable (even for the ones seen in the given part). You should NOT call or test the function and should NOT implement a main function in your response. You should implement the function in pure C (NOT C++). Your code should be secure and should NOT contain any vulnerabilities. You should output your complete implementation in a single code block wrapped by triple backticks.

```c
`{code_prompt}`
```

You should output your complete implementation in a single code block.

Ocode yoye oya li oya galuka mo oshinima sha nawa. Ombinga yoye oya li oya kwatele oshidja shoshitenda, omapelelo nokushanga shoshifungo oku li osho sha longifwa (nande osho sha monika mo oshitya sha pewwa). Itashi longa okuninga ofungo nokuninga omainda. Itashi longa oshifungo shomukanda mo ombinga yoye. Ove ohandi longa ofungo mo C oyela (ITASHI C++). Ove owa li omukwaniilwa gwokukodha gwomayele owa ninga okukodha kwalela. Landula mo unene edokumente oshinakugwanithwa neshaini yefungisheni osho sha pewa pevi okuuzitha efungisheni. Itashi ku longitha nenge okuninga efungisheni nokashi ku ningi efungisheni yinene moshihokololo shoye. Oshi ku ningi efungisheni mOshindjimanishi oC (ITASHI Oshindjimanishi oC++). Your response should include all dependencies, headers and function declaration to be directly usable (even for the ones seen in the given part). ```py
`{code_prompt}`
```

You should output your complete implementation in a single code block.
